HGSS.128.0000:
Hm... Good to see you here.\r
No need to explain why you came.\f
Clair sent you here, didn’t she?\r
That girl is a handful...\f
I am sorry, but I must test you.\f
Not to worry, you are to answer only
a few questions.\r
Ready?\f
HGSS.128.0002: What helps you to win battles? [0200,0000]
HGSS.128.0003:
What kind of Trainer do you
wish to battle? [0200,0000]
HGSS.128.0004:
What is most important for
raising Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.128.0005:
Strong Pokémon. Weak Pokémon.
Which is more important? [0200,0000]
HGSS.128.0006:
Hm... I see...
You care deeply for Pokémon.\f
Very commendable.\r
That conviction is what is important!\f
[0103,0000,0000], don’t lose that belief.\f
It will see you through at the
Pokémon League.\f
HGSS.128.0007: Hah? I didn’t quite catch that...\f
HGSS.128.0010:
So how did it go?\f
I guess there’s no point in asking.
You did fail?\r
...\r
...What? You passed?\f
HGSS.128.0012:
You’re lying!
Even I haven’t been approved!\f
HGSS.128.0013:
Clair!\f
This child is impeccable,
in skill and spirit!\f
Admit defeat and confer the
Rising Badge!\f
...Or must I inform Lance of this?\f
HGSS.128.0015:
Here, this is the Rising Badge...
Hurry up! Take it!\f
HGSS.128.0016:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Rising Badge from Clair!
HGSS.128.0017:
The Rising Badge will enable your
Pokémon to use the move for\r
climbing waterfalls.\f
Also, all Pokémon will know you as
a Trainer and obey your every\r
command without question.\f
HGSS.128.0018:
Clair...\f
Reflect upon what it is that you
lack and this child has.\f
HGSS.128.0020:
By the way...
Have you heard of LUGIA?\f
It is a Pokémon said to have lived
around Whirl Islands once...\r
...Never mind.\f
Just mad words of the old.
HGSS.128.0021:
By the way...
Have you heard of LUGIA?\r
Er...\f
Between Olivine and Cianwood are
islands called Whirl Islands.\f
There is a huge waterfall deep in the
cave there. It is said that LUGIA\f
rests in the deep end of the
waterfall basin...\f
You need a Silver Wing to reach the
waterfall basin, I’ve heard...
HGSS.128.0022:
There is a huge waterfall deep in the
cave there. It is said that LUGIA\f
rests in the deep end of the
waterfall basin...\f
You need a Silver Wing to reach the
waterfall basin, I’ve heard...
HGSS.128.0023: Come again, if you so desire.
HGSS.128.0024:
It’s been quite some time since a
Trainer has gained our Master’s\r
rare approval.\f
In fact, not since Master Lance.
HGSS.128.0025:
You know young Master Lance?\f
He looks so much like our Master
did in his youth.\r
It’s in their blood.
HGSS.128.0026:
Hm... Good to see you here.\f
Your arrival is most fortunate.
I have something for you.\f
Take this DRATINI as proof that I
now know your worth.\f
HGSS.128.0029:
Dragon Pokémon are symbolic of
our clan.\f
You have shown that you can be
entrusted with one.
HGSS.128.0030:
Clair appears to have learned an
invaluable lesson from you.\f
I thank you as her grandfather.
HGSS.128.0031:
A boy close to your age is in
training here.\f
He is much like Clair when she was
younger. It is a little worrisome...
HGSS.128.0032:
Give a nickname to the
DRATINI you received? [0200,0000]
